description: Style NoteCrank up your kid's sport style as the cricket craze kicks off this summer, with this KKR boys Fan gear tee shirt from reebok. The apple of your eye will be displaying team pride with this tee as he cheers on his favourite players at the IPL. There's no better way of saying 'Go Riders!' than with this jersey!Product DetailsPurple T-shirt has a round neck, short sleeves, Reebok branding on right chest and Kolkata Knight Riders logo on left chestMaterial and CarePolyesterMachine wash in lukewarm water below 40 degrees, using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not soak, bleach, tumble dry, dry clean or iron on print/trims/ logoDry in shadeWarm iron
